scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix root-config && npm install --prefix mf-productos-contratar && npm install --prefix mf-productos-contratados && npm install --prefix ui-kit
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix ui-kit && npm run build --prefix mf-productos-contratar && npm run build --prefix mf-productos-contratados && npm run build --prefix root-config
scripts.start: npm run build && concurrently -n root-config,catalog,settings,ui-kit -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npx serve root-config/dist -l 3000 --no-clipboard" "npx serve mf-productos-contratar/dist -l 3001 --cors --no-clipboard" "npx serve mf-productos-contratados/dist -l 3002 --cors --no-clipboard" "npx serve ui-kit/dist -l 3003 --cors --no-clipboard"
